## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://-24a04112.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://-24a04112.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About על-גלגלים
A retail shop specializing in bicycles and skateboards, operating in the action sports and urban mobility space. The business caters to both cycling enthusiasts and skateboarding culture, combining two dynamic and youth-oriented worlds under one roof.

## Target Audience
- הרפתקנים עירוניים צעירים
- משפחות עם ילדים פעילים
- חובבי כושר

## Industry
ספורט ופנאי
